title_en: The Filing Cabinet Problem: Why Continual Learning Is the Real Bottleneck for AI
dek_en: In a recent episode of *最佳拍档* (Best Partner), the host Da Fei walks viewers through an A16Z long-read published on April 22 that puts continual learning at the center of the next phase of AI infrastructure. His central claim, borrowed from
title_zh: 持续学习：让大模型走出"记忆碎片"的下一道关口
dek_zh: 在最佳拍档的这期节目里，主持人大飞拆解了 A16Z 在 4 月 22 日发布的一篇关于持续学习（Continual Learning）的万字长文。他的核心论点很直接：今天再强的大模型，本质上仍然是一个"失忆患者"，而持续学习才是 AI 从工具走向智能的必经之路。
